body.title: Wire workflow ProposedExperiment → experiment scheduler enqueue
body.result: 11c9b51e — TurnPipeline._enqueue_experiments converts blob.proposed_experiment via from_proposed() and enqueues to ExperimentScheduler. PathStep.EXPERIMENT_ENQUEUE trace, enqueued_experiment_ids on TurnResult. 3 tests.
body.description: When TurnPipeline receives a DecisionBlob with proposed_experiments, convert each ProposedExperiment to an Experiment (using from_proposed() bridge) and enqueue via ExperimentScheduler. This closes the reasoning→experiment loop. The reasoning workflows are the proposer — no separate proposer needed.
